name: tedx-learning-pathways
description: Curate TEDx Talks YouTube library into learning pathways with Fable skill handoffs

steps.text: Skill tedx-learning-pathways. Library: youtube.com/user/TEDxTalks / @TEDx. Not a degree. No video scrape/rehost. TEDx quality varies. Claims need primary sources for high stakes.

steps.prompt: Using skill tedx-learning-pathways and knowledge/education/tedx-learning-pathways.md, produce tedx-plan: (1) verdict — curated pathway from TEDx YouTube library, not academic credit (2) channel-contrast TEDx vs TED vs TED-Ed (3) choose pathway P1–P8 or custom from user goal (4) build-pathway with 3–7 talks (use seed watch URLs only when listed; else search cues + VERIFY LIVE) (5) active-watch protocol per talk (6) skill-handoff into Fable skills (7) claim-check for health/money/science claims (8) write-knowledge scaffold workspace/education/tedx-pathways/ (9) host-map if privacy asked (10) OPEN copyright and quality variance. Do not invent view counts or scrape the channel.
